objective: Orchestrate Codex-only post-ingest work for all completed MTA wiki ingest outputs with unprocessed backlog, while keeping ingest waves running separately at max concurrency without babysitting them.
completion_decision: Do not mark the goal complete: ingest/source scope and deterministic cleanup gates are clean, and writer dispatch is prepared, but writer execution remains paused with empty writer regions.

requirements.requirement: Keep ingest waves running separately at max concurrency when ready-never-ingested sources exist.
requirements.conclusion: No ingest wave should be launched now because the ready pool is exhausted.

requirements.requirement: Keep deterministic Codex-only post-ingest cleanup gates clean.
requirements.conclusion: Validation and source-id drift gates are clean.

requirements.requirement: Ensure every current readiness source has post-ingest scope coverage and no plan-only ghost scope remains.
requirements.conclusion: Post-ingest scope coverage is complete for the current readiness corpus.

requirements.requirement: Prepare writer backlog execution without violating the owner pause.
requirements.conclusion: Writer dispatch is ready and claimed, but writer pages remain empty because execution is paused.

writer_readiness.execution_policy: Readiness report only. Do not launch writer agents or edit wiki prose until the owner pause is lifted.
